title: The Sailor Takes a Wife
writer: Anne Morrison Chapin, Whitfield Cook, Chester Erskine
actors: Robert Walker, June Allyson, Hume Cronyn
plot: While waiting in New York City to ship out to Europe, a sailor stops by a serviceman's canteen and meets a USO hostess. They immediately fall for each other and get married that night. However, when the sailor is notified that he ...
